rationale: Educ. Code §12.128 concerns charter school property tax exemptions under Tax Code §11.11, not the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The proposed homestead exemption increase does not intersect with this provision.
quote: is exempt from ad valorem taxation as provided by Section 11.11, Tax Code.
_note: No conflict; §12.128 references Tax Code §11.11 (charter property exemption), not §11.13(b) (residence homestead exemption).
